status.title: Status
status.description: Filter by status (comma separated for multiple).

afterStart.title: Start Date (From)
afterStart.description: Fetch bookings starting after this date (ISO 8601).

beforeEnd.title: End Date (To)
beforeEnd.description: Fetch bookings ending before this date (ISO 8601).

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Max number of bookings to retrieve.
